name: bigstitcher
description: Performs 3-D multi-tile and multi-angle alignment using BigStitcher-Spark

tools.name: BigStitcher
tools.description: The BigStitcher is a software package that allows simple and efficient alignment of multi-tile and multi-angle image datasets, for example acquired by lightsheet, widefield or confocal microscopes.

inputs.name: meta
inputs.description: Groovy map containing: id, input_image_dataset

inputs.name: spark
inputs.description: Map containing spark cluster information

inputs.name: module_class
inputs.description: Module class name

inputs.name: module_args
inputs.description: Module specific arguments. These depend on the module class

inputs.name: data_files
inputs.description: Data files

outputs.name: meta
outputs.description: Groovy map containing: id, input_image_dataset

outputs.name: spark
outputs.description: Tuple spark cluster metadata

name: bigstream_registration

name: bioformats2raw
description: Convert any Bioformats-compatible image to OME-Zarr format

inputs.name: ch_meta
inputs.description:
Channel of tuples containing a meta map, the input image, an 
output path where the OME-Zarr should be created, and a memo directory
where temporary files will be saved.
Structure: [ val(meta), path(input_image), val(output_path), val(memo_directory) ]

outputs.name: params
outputs.description:
Same as the input tuple but replaces output paths with the OME-Zarr that 
was created.
Structure: [ val(meta), path(input_image), val(zarr_output_path) ]

outputs.name: versions
outputs.description: File containing software versions

name: cellpose
description: Performs a 3-D segmentation using cellpose distributed on a dask cluster

tools.name: cellpose
tools.description: A generalist algorithm for cell and nucleus segmentation.

inputs.name: meta
inputs.description: Groovy map containing: id, input_image_dataset, output_image_name

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: Path to the image

inputs.name: image_subpath
inputs.description: Relative path to the image dataset if needed (for N5 or zarr containers)

inputs.name: dask_config
inputs.description: Optional path to the dask config. If this is not specified pass in as empty list.

inputs.name: models_path
inputs.description: Optional path to the cellpose models cache directory. If this is not specified pass in as empty list.

inputs.name: outputdir
inputs.description: Directory location of the output image

inputs.name: output_name
inputs.description: Name the generated output file(s).

inputs.name: dask_scheduler
inputs.description: Dask scheduler IP

inputs.name: cellpose_cpus
inputs.description: Number of cpus needed to run the main cellpose program

inputs.name: cellpose_mem_in_gb
inputs.description: Memory needed for the main cellpose program

outputs.name: meta
outputs.description: Groovy map containing: id, input_image_dataset, output_image_name

outputs.name: results
outputs.description: Tuple containing meta, input image, output dir

outputs.name: result_names
outputs.description: Tuple containing result names and extensions

outputs.name: versions
outputs.description: File containing software versions

name: cellpose
description: Performs a 3-D segmentation using cellpose distributed on a dask cluster

tools.name: cellpose
tools.description: A generalist algorithm for cell and nucleus segmentation.

inputs.name: meta
inputs.description: Groovy map containing: id, input_image_dataset, output_image_name

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: Path to the image container

inputs.name: image_subpath
inputs.description: Relative path to the image dataset if needed (for N5 or zarr containers)

inputs.name: models_path
inputs.description: Optional path to the cellpose models cache directory. If this is not specified pass in as empty list.

inputs.name: model_name
inputs.description: The name of the cellpose model.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Directory location of the output image container

inputs.name: labels
inputs.description: Name of the labels container created at the location specified by output_dir

inputs.name: labels_subpath
inputs.description: Relative labels dataset subpath

inputs.name: working_dir
inputs.description:
Location of the temporary files created during the segmentation. This must have enough space to hold the temporary labels 
before they are reassigned during the merge process

inputs.name: dask_scheduler
inputs.description: Dask scheduler IP

inputs.name: dask_config
inputs.description: Optional path to the dask config. If this is not specified pass in as empty list.

inputs.name: preprocessing_config
inputs.description:
Optional YAML file holding the configuration parameters for various preprocessing operations.
So far the only preprocessing available is a gaussian filter but there may be more in the future

inputs.name: logging_config
inputs.description: Optional log config.

inputs.name: cellpose_cpus
inputs.description: Number of cpus needed to run the main cellpose program

inputs.name: cellpose_mem_in_gb
inputs.description: Memory needed for the main cellpose program

outputs.name: meta
outputs.description: Groovy map containing: id, input_image_dataset, output_image_name

outputs.name: input_image_fullpath
outputs.description: Full path to the input image container

outputs.name: image_subpath
outputs.description: Subpath to the input image dataset

outputs.name: output_label_images
outputs.description:
One or more image names containing segmentation results. If the output is a zarr or N5 container
there's only one output_label_image, but if the output type is a tiff and the segmented image is large
there can be multiple tiff files

outputs.name: output_labels_subpath
outputs.description: this is the labels dataset if the output is a zarr or N5 container

outputs.name: versions
outputs.description: File containing software versions

name: spark_start
description:
Starts Spark processing either by spinning up a cluster or setting up
variables so that processing can run locally as individual jobs

inputs.name: ch_meta
inputs.description:
Channel of tuples where the first item is the meta map which 
contains a "spark_work_dir" field.
Structure: [ val(meta), [ files ] ]

inputs.name: data_dir
inputs.description: Paths to be mounted in the Spark workers for data access

inputs.name: spark_cluster
inputs.description: Whether or not to spin up a Spark cluster

inputs.name: spark_workers
inputs.description: Number of workers in the cluster

inputs.name: spark_worker_cores
inputs.description: Number of cores per Spark worker

inputs.name: spark_gb_per_core
inputs.description: Number of GB of memory per worker core

inputs.name: spark_driver_cores
inputs.description: Number of cores for the Spark driver

inputs.name: spark_driver_memory
inputs.description: Memory specification for the Spark driver

outputs.name: spark_context
outputs.description:
The tuple from input ch_meta with the spark_context map appended.
Structure: [ val(meta), [ files ], val(spark_context) ]

name: spark_start
description:
Starts Spark processing either by spinning up a cluster or setting up
variables so that processing can run locally as individual jobs

Channel of tuples containing a meta map and a list of data paths

inputs.description: Whether or not to spin up a Spark cluster

inputs.name: working_dir
inputs.description: Path shared by workers for logging and jar distribution

inputs.name: spark_workers
inputs.description: Number of workers in the cluster

inputs.name: min_workers
inputs.description: Minimum number of spark workers that must be available on the spark cluster

inputs.name: spark_worker_cpus
inputs.description: Number of CPUs per Spark worker

inputs.name: spark_executor_cpus
inputs.description: Number of CPUs for a spark executor

inputs.name: spark_executor_mem_gb
inputs.description: Memory resource in GB allocated for a spark executor

inputs.name: spark_executor_overhead_mem_gb
inputs.description: Memory overhead for a spark executor

inputs.name: spark_driver_cpus
inputs.description: Number of CPUs for the Spark driver

inputs.name: spark_driver_mem_gb
inputs.description: Number of GB of memory for the Spark driver

inputs.name: spark_gb_per_core
inputs.description: Number of GB of memory per worker core

outputs.name: spark_context

The tuple from input ch_meta with the spark_context map appended.

name: spark_stop
description:
Stops Spark processing by writing a marker file which terminates the 
cluster processes.

inputs.name: ch_meta
inputs.description:
Channel of tuples where the first item is the meta map, then a 
list of related files, and finally a spark_context map. Only the 
third item is used by this subworkflow. 
Structure: [ val(meta), [ files ], val(spark_context) ]

outputs.name: done
outputs.description: The Spark work directory that was terminated.

name: spark_stop
description:
Stops Spark processing by writing a marker file which terminates the 
cluster processes.

inputs.name: ch_meta
inputs.description:
Channel of tuples where the first item is the meta map, and the second is a 
a spark context map.
Structure: [ val(meta), val(spark) ]

outputs.name: done
outputs.description: Same as the input tuple.
